title: 宝塚記念の後に・キーワード②

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I beat you, you beat me not! I beat you, you beat
me not!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I BEAT YOU! Hah! How do ya like that? I won!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I lost to a weirdo like you! Ughhh, this sucks.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You mad, bro? Wanna go again? 'Cause I'm
down.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You are literally the worst! This is not over!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'm gonna take you on in one of those
big races, and you're gonna be toast.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oho! One of the big 'uns, huh? Sure, you're on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't seem like it'll be long before Gold Ship
and Tosen Jordan face off again.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And before I forget, here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like I know. Someone just told me to give it to
you. Later.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's have a look-see.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeah. This one says "QUA."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The paper Flash gave me had "UM," and now I've
got "QUA." It's all clear now...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Clear that I've got no clue what this means, that
is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meaning of the hints might not be clear, but
there is something that is. Since both Eishin Flash
and Tosen Jordan had a clue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It must mean someone is orchestrating this and
giving them the information.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who's the mastermind behind this "Eden" Gold
Ship is pursuing, and what is their agenda? I can't
help but be intrigued.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship! Congrats on defending the title!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I was on the edge of my seat, worried you might
stumble! But you did it again!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hold on... Again? What did I do again?
choice_data_list:
You won the Takarazuka Kinen last year too,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Seriously? Wow, I'm actually really
awesome.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: C'mon now. If you're gonna celebrate me, celebrate me like you mean it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna pick up some red and white bean buns.
You can have the doughy part.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahaha! Etched into history, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What a monumental achievement! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's official! I flourish when showered with
compliments!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you really heap 'em on in the future
too, okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But you know, when you say it that way, it really
sets my soul on fire!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll come back burning even hotter next year!
From the second the race starts—no, even better,
the second I walk through the gate, I'll unleash my
blazing intensity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is already in senior year. There is no
"next year" in her debut series. And besid—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: BURN BABY, BUUURN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have a feeling she might do something rash...
